active_planning_focus: Ready for ni-end confirmation after conversation resolved the blocker policy-source question.
last_planning_summary: The model-maintained docs and contract describe a refund triage assistant that drafts recommendations only, escalates ambiguity, and uses the internal refund policy page as authority. ni status reports READY_WITH_DEFERRALS because DEC-004 and OQ-002 remain visible but non-blocking under the prototype profile.

pending_questions.title: Which support dashboard will eventually display the recommendation draft?

recent_decisions.title: Treat the internal refund policy page as the authoritative eligibility source.
Use human-team as the first downstream prompt target after lock.
Final production owner for maintaining the refund policy page.

recent_risks.title: The assistant may imply refund approval authority that belongs to humans or payment systems.
A stale or unclear policy page could create incorrect refund recommendations.

notes.planning_aid_only: Session state is a planning aid, not authority.
notes.locked_docs: Session state must not override locked docs.
notes.completion: Session state must not mark docs complete.
notes.raw_transcript: Raw transcript is not the source of truth.
